hero.headline: MAHE Online MBA in Marketing: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: NAAC A++ | NIRF #3 University 2025 | Institution of Eminence | UGC-DEB Approved | Total fees ₹2,92,000

sections.tldr: MAHE Online MBA in Marketing covers consumer behaviour, digital marketing, services marketing and CRM, sales and distribution management, marketing analytics, and integrated marketing communication. NAAC A++ NIRF #3 University 2025 with Institution of Eminence tag. Total fee ₹2,92,000 (₹73,000 per semester). Zero-cost EMI ₹12,167/month. Coursera Plus access bundled free. 8 scholarship categories (up to 40% SAARC/EWC). Work experience in reputed organisations required; fresh graduates submit SOP video.

about.body:
MAHE's Online MBA in Marketing covers both traditional and digital marketing at depth. Semester 3 covers consumer behaviour (decision models, psychographics, cultural influences), digital marketing (SEO, SEM, social media strategy, performance marketing), and services marketing with CRM (SERVQUAL, customer lifecycle management, retention strategies). Semester 4 adds sales and distribution management, marketing analytics (campaign ROI, attribution modelling, A/B testing), and integrated marketing communication (media planning, ATL-BTL integration, brand communication).

MAHE (Manipal Academy of Higher Education) is a deemed university in Manipal, Karnataka, ranked NIRF #3 University 2025 with an Institution of Eminence tag from the Government of India. NAAC A++ accredited. The Manipal brand carries weight across healthcare, engineering, and management sectors in India and internationally.

Coursera Plus is bundled free with the programme, giving access to 7,000+ courses from Google, IBM, Meta, and top universities. This is a genuine curriculum expansion, not a marketing add-on.

At ₹2,92,000 total (₹73,000 per semester), this is upper-mid range in the Indian online MBA market. MAHE positions on flagship brand weight and IoE tag. Candidates should compare against MUJ (same Manipal group, ₹1,80,000) for fee-value trade-off.

Work experience in reputed organisations is required. Fresh graduates can apply with an SOP video submission.

EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Semesters 1-2 cover the common MBA management core (Managing People and Organisations, Financial Reporting, Managerial Economics, Business Communication, Business Statistics in Sem 1; Financial Management, Marketing Management, Strategic Management, IT for Business, Business Leadership, Research Methodology in Sem 2). Semesters 3-4 below show the Marketing specialisation subjects.

subjects.name: Management Accounting
subjects.desc: Cost analysis, budgeting, variance analysis, and management decision-making using accounting data.

subjects.name: Legal Aspects of Business
subjects.desc: Contract law, consumer protection, intellectual property, company law basics, and business regulatory compliance.

subjects.name: Minor Project
subjects.desc: Applied management research project on a marketing topic, supervised by faculty.

subjects.name: Consumer Behavior
subjects.desc: Consumer decision-making models, psychographic and demographic segmentation, cultural influences, perception, attitudes, and digital consumer behaviour patterns.

subjects.name: Digital Marketing
subjects.desc: SEO and SEM fundamentals, social media marketing strategy, content marketing, email marketing automation, performance marketing metrics, and Google Analytics.

subjects.name: Services Marketing and Customer Relationship Management
subjects.desc: Services marketing 7Ps, SERVQUAL model, service blueprint design, CRM systems, customer lifecycle management, retention strategies, and service recovery.

subjects.name: Entrepreneurship and Innovation
subjects.desc: Startup ideation, business model canvas, lean startup methodology, funding strategies, and innovation management.

subjects.name: Sustainability
subjects.desc: Sustainable business models, ESG frameworks, circular economy principles, and CSR strategy.

subjects.name: Capstone Project
subjects.desc: Comprehensive marketing capstone integrating Sem 1-4 learning. Industry-linked problem with faculty and external evaluation.

subjects.name: Sales and Distribution Management
subjects.desc: Sales force design, territory management, distributor management, channel conflict resolution, trade marketing, and sales performance metrics.

subjects.name: Marketing Analytics
subjects.desc: Campaign ROI measurement, marketing attribution models, A/B testing methodology, customer segmentation analytics, and CLV calculation.

subjects.name: Integrated Marketing Communication
subjects.desc: IMC planning frameworks, media mix optimisation, ATL-BTL integration, PR and corporate communication, event marketing, and campaign measurement.

whoHires.body:
MAHE MBA Marketing graduates target roles across FMCG, digital, retail, and services marketing:

**Industries:** FMCG, e-commerce, banking (product marketing), telecom, media and entertainment, consumer durables, hospitality, healthcare marketing, and digital agencies

**Entry-level roles:** Marketing Executive, Brand Executive, Digital Marketing Analyst, Sales Executive, Market Research Analyst, Content Marketing Associate

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Brand Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, Regional Sales Manager, Product Marketing Manager, Marketing Analytics Manager, CRM Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Marketing, CMO, Head of Digital Marketing, National Sales Director, Head of Brand Management, Chief Commercial Officer

**Employers:** FMCG (HUL, ITC, P&G, Nestle), e-commerce (Flipkart, Amazon India, Nykaa), banking (HDFC, ICICI product marketing), IT (Infosys, TCS, Wipro marketing divisions), and healthcare (Apollo, Manipal Hospitals marketing).

**Note:** MAHE provides career support services. The Manipal alumni network spans healthcare, engineering, and management sectors across India and internationally.

skills.body:
The Marketing specialisation builds skills across brand, digital, sales, and analytics:

**Technical skills:**
- Digital Marketing: SEO audit, Google Ads campaign structure, Meta Ads Manager basics, email automation workflow design, and content marketing calendar planning
- Marketing Analytics: campaign ROI calculation, attribution model comparison (first-touch, last-touch, multi-touch), A/B test design, and CLV estimation
- CRM: customer lifecycle stage mapping, retention programme design, NPS programme management, and CRM platform configuration basics
- Sales Management: territory design, distributor ROI calculation, trade scheme evaluation, and sales pipeline management

**Applied skills:**
- Brand Management: brand equity audit, positioning map construction, product lifecycle strategy, and new product launch planning
- IMC Planning: media plan design, budget allocation across channels, and campaign effectiveness measurement

**Soft skills:** Presenting marketing strategy to boards, negotiating with agencies and media partners, managing cross-functional product launch teams, and leading brand turnaround initiatives.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MAHE Online MBA Marketing against peer programmes:

**vs MUJ Online MBA Marketing:** MUJ at approximately ₹1,80,000 is from the same Manipal group, runs on the same online platform, and offers a similar LMS experience. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹1,12,000 more. MAHE positions on the flagship NIRF #3 University tag and Institution of Eminence status. MUJ positions on fee value. For employers who specifically value the MAHE Manipal flagship brand, the premium may be justified. For employers who treat both as Manipal group degrees, MUJ offers better fee-for-delivery value. Be transparent: MAHE is not a premium product upgrade over MUJ in terms of platform delivery.

**vs Amity Online MBA Marketing:** Amity at approximately ₹2,25,000 with NIRF #22 has a larger alumni network and broader specialisation variety. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹67,000 more but carries NIRF #3 and Institution of Eminence. MAHE includes Coursera Plus free. For pure NIRF rank signalling, MAHE wins decisively.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Marketing Management:** NMIMS at approximately ₹1,96,000 has strong Mumbai recruiter networks and longer online MBA heritage. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹96,000 more but carries substantially stronger NIRF rank (#3 vs unranked in university category). MAHE includes Coursera Plus.

**vs DPU Pune Online MBA Marketing Management:** DPU at ₹1,89,400 with NIRF #41 and NAAC A++. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹1,02,600 more but carries NIRF #3 and IoE status. DPU includes edX certifications; MAHE includes Coursera Plus.

fees.body:
The MAHE Online MBA in Marketing has a total programme fee of ₹2,92,000 inclusive of all taxes.

**Semester-wise fee breakdown:**
- Semester 1: ₹73,000
- Semester 2: ₹73,000
- Semester 3: ₹73,000
- Semester 4: ₹73,000
- **Total: ₹2,92,000**

**Application fee:** ₹500 one-time.

**Zero-cost EMI:** ₹12,167/month directly through the university (no external NBFC, no interest charges).

**Scholarships (8 categories):**
- Defence Personnel / Ex-servicemen: 20% (min 2 years armed forces service)
- Divyaang / PwD: 20% (disability ID/certificate)
- Merit: 10% (75%+ aggregate in entry qualification)
- MAHE/AGE Alumni: 15% (UG/PG from MAHE or AGE with 75%+ in graduation)
- SAARC and EWC Nationals: 40% (passport/ID verification)
- Female Learners: 15% (Aadhaar verification)
- Doctors: 15% (MCI Registration India / Medical Registration international)
- Corporate Employees: 15% (UAN Card + Org ID + Appointment Letter)

**Important:** Learners opting for loan or financing are not eligible for additional discounts or offers.

**Bundled:** Coursera Plus access free with the programme.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with MAHE each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive an MBA degree certificate with Marketing as the specialisation, issued by Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) under UGC-DEB 2020 online mode standards.

The degree carries NAAC A++ accreditation, NIRF #3 University rank, and Institution of Eminence status from the Government of India. It is valid for government recruitment, PSU applications, and private-sector employers. The MAHE brand is recognised internationally with QS World ranking and WES recognition. DigiLocker issuance is standard.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from MAHE Online MBA Marketing students. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Rahul M.
items.liked: Digital Marketing and Marketing Analytics subjects were current and practical. Coursera Plus gave me access to Google Digital Marketing certificate alongside the MBA
items.disliked: At ₹2,92,000 the fee is hard to justify when MUJ offers nearly the same platform experience for ₹1,80,000. The MAHE brand premium needs to translate to better placement support to be worth the difference
items.body: I chose MAHE over MUJ specifically for the NIRF #3 brand on my CV. The marketing subjects were solid. Consumer Behaviour and IMC were well-structured. Coursera Plus was genuinely useful for supplementing with Google and Meta certifications. The LMS is functional but not dramatically different from what MUJ offers. If the MAHE brand matters for your employer, the premium is worth it. If not, MUJ gives you similar content at a lower price.

items.name: Sneha P.
items.liked: Services Marketing and CRM subject was directly applicable to my hospitality industry role. The Manipal brand opened doors at companies that filter on university reputation
items.disliked: Placement support could be more structured. The career services exist but are not as hands-on as what campus MBA students get. Self-directed networking is still essential
items.body: I work in hospitality marketing and the CRM, digital marketing, and sales management subjects were directly applicable. The NIRF #3 and IoE tag gave the credential weight during my promotion review. The 15% female learner scholarship reduced my effective fee, which helped justify the premium over other options.

items.name: Karthik V.
items.liked: Marketing Analytics covered attribution modelling and A/B testing at a practical level. The Manipal alumni network in South India is genuinely strong
items.disliked: Study materials for some modules felt recycled from the campus programme without enough adaptation for online delivery. Some recorded lectures were not engaging
items.body: The marketing curriculum is comprehensive but the online delivery quality varies by subject. Some faculty are excellent, others feel like they are reading from slides. Coursera Plus is the genuine value-add. At ₹2,92,000 you need to be clear that you are paying for the MAHE brand, not for a dramatically superior learning experience compared to MUJ or other platforms in the ₹1.8-2.2L range.

faqs.question: How does MAHE Marketing compare to MUJ Marketing?
faqs.answer: Both run on the same platform with similar LMS experience. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 carries NIRF #3 and Institution of Eminence status. MUJ at approximately ₹1,80,000 offers better fee value. MAHE is not a premium product upgrade in terms of delivery. The difference is brand positioning and credential signalling.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus included free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Coursera Plus is bundled free with the MAHE online MBA, giving access to 7,000+ courses including Google Digital Marketing, Meta Marketing Analytics, and other professional certificates. This is available throughout the programme duration.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available?
faqs.answer: 8 categories: Defence 20%, Divyaang 20%, Merit 10% (75%+ aggregate), MAHE/AGE Alumni 15%, SAARC/EWC 40%, Female Learners 15%, Doctors 15%, Corporate Employees 15%. Important: learners opting for loan or financing are not eligible for additional discounts.

faqs.question: Can fresh graduates apply?
faqs.answer: Work experience in reputed organisations is required. Fresh graduates can apply by submitting an SOP video as part of the admission process. This is evaluated by the admissions team.

faqs.question: What is the total fee and EMI option?
faqs.answer: ₹2,92,000 total (₹73,000 per semester for 4 semesters). ₹500 application fee. Zero-cost EMI at ₹12,167/month directly through the university. No external NBFC or interest charges. Reconfirm with our counsellor before payment.

chooseIf: NIRF #3 University rank and Institution of Eminence tag matter for your employer or career trajectory.
The Manipal flagship brand (not MUJ) specifically adds value in your industry or geography.
Coursera Plus bundled free genuinely expands your learning beyond the MBA syllabus.
You qualify for one of the 8 scholarship categories (up to 40% SAARC/EWC) which reduces the effective fee.
consider: MUJ at ₹1,80,000 offers similar platform delivery at ₹1,12,000 less. If your employer treats both as Manipal group degrees, MUJ is better value.
Amity at ₹2,25,000 or NMIMS at ₹1,96,000 offer marketing MBA at lower fees with their own brand networks.
You are financing the fee via loan, which disqualifies all scholarships, making the effective cost higher than alternatives.
